title: A_uninfected
treatment_protocol_ch1: After 1 week differentiation, macrophages were either left uninfected or infected with Mtb strain H37Rv at a MOI of 10 for 48 hours.
growth_protocol_ch1: Monocytes were extracted from platelet-depleted blood from healthy human donors by Ficoll density gradient centrifugation and plastic adherence. Monocytes were allowed to adhere for 4 hours, after which non-adherent non-monocytes were washed away in 1X phosphate-buffered saline. Monocytes were differentiated for one week. Cells were cultured in RPMI-1640 + 10% fetal bovine serum + 4mM L-glutamine.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated using the Qiagen AllPrep DNA/RNA Mini Kit (Qiagen, Cat # 80204) following manufacutrer instructions.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA sequencing libraries were prepared using the Illumina TruSeq RNA library prep kit v2 (Illumina, Cat # RS-122-2011)
data_processing.1: sorting and SAM/BAM conversion using samtools
data_processing.2: read assembly, quantification, merging using Stringtie
data_processing.4: differential expression analysis using prepDE.py and DESeq2
data_processing.6: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: CSV files containing gene or transcript count matrix
